title: carduncellus tingitanus
intro: Carduncellus tingitanus, also known as Spanish thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Compositae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Carduncellus tingitanus include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
